title: Resource Utilization Template
excerpt: I found a Template in the Template Center in Monday.dev called Resource Utilization.   I can’t find any Help topics related to how to set this up, link or use with any project tasks in other boards.  Is anyone using this…

posts.author: jcorrea (Jose Correa)
posts.cookedHtml: I found a Template in the Template Center in Monday.dev called Resource Utilization. I can’t find any Help topics related to how to set this up, link or use with any project tasks in other boards. Is anyone using this template and provide some info on how to set this up?
